name: Coral RuPay Credit Card

domestic: Offers 1 complimentary domestic airport lounge access per quarter, subject to spending ₹75,000 in the preceding calendar quarter.
Offers 1 complimentary domestic railway lounge access per quarter (no spends criteria).
One complimentary domestic railway lounge visit per quarter

milestones.label: 2,000 reward points on spending ₹2,00,000 and 1,000 reward points each time ₹1,00,000 spend is crossed thereafter in an anniversary year, capped at 10,000 points per year

milestoneBenefits: 2,000 reward points on spending ₹2,00,000 and 1,000 reward points each time ₹1,00,000 spend is crossed thereafter in an anniversary year, capped at 10,000 points per year
additionalBenefits: One complimentary domestic railway lounge visit per quarter
25% discount on BookMyShow and INOX movie tickets, capped at ₹100 twice a month, subject to spending ₹25,000 in the preceding calendar quarter
1% fuel surcharge waiver on all fuel transactions of ₹400 to ₹4,000 at HPCL petrol pumps
additionalDetails: A transaction fee of 1% applies to utility payments exceeding ₹50,000 per month

Official audit completed on 2026-06-06 using ICICI Bank Coral RuPay page and terms.
Joining fee of ₹500 and Annual fee of ₹500. Annual fee is waived on spending ₹1.5 Lakhs or more in the previous anniversary year.
Earns 2 Reward Points per ₹100 spent on retail and UPI merchant spends (0.5% return value).
Earns 1 Reward Point per ₹100 spent on utility and insurance spends (0.25% return value).
1% fuel surcharge waiver on fuel transactions of ₹400 to ₹4,000 at HPCL petrol pumps.
Offers 1 complimentary domestic airport lounge access per quarter, subject to spending ₹75,000 in the preceding calendar quarter.
Offers 1 complimentary domestic railway lounge access per quarter (no spends criteria).
Offers 25% discount on BookMyShow and INOX movie tickets, capped at ₹100 twice a month, subject to spending ₹25,000 in the preceding calendar quarter.
Eligibility: Age must be 21-65 years; minimum monthly income of ₹20,000 for both salaried and self-employed.
